name: 24"x78" Tropical Foliage Woven Outdoor Chaise Lounge Cushion - Threshold™
description:
Add comfort to your patio, deck or poolside seating with this 78-Ounce x 24-Inch Woven Outdoor Chaise Lounge Cushion from Threshold™. This hinged chaise lounge cushion upholstered in woven UV-resistant fabric is designed for lasting outdoor use. The soft fill offers comfortable lounging. Plus, the attached ties allow you to secure it to your chaise lounge chair frame with ease.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you
